product.title: Pink Muhly Grass
product.body_html:
The Pink Muhly Grass is a low-maintenance ornamental grass that produces stunning pink plumes from late summer through fall. A native to the southeastern United States.

Growing Zones: 6-11

Sun Requirements: Full Sun

Mature Height: 3-4 ft.

Mature Spread: 3-4 ft.

Bloom Season: Late Summer - Fall

Growth Rate: Moderate
